narrative:
Precinct Urbana 2-B (precinct in Champaign County) has 957 registered voters, with 41.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 46.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.6 percentage points.
